label: Spam / marketing email - should not be actionable

data.subject: 🎉 Limited Time Offer: 50% OFF Enterprise Plan!
data.textBody:
Don't miss out!

For a limited time, get 50% off our Enterprise Plan. That's just $49/month instead of $99/month!

What you get:
✅ Unlimited users
✅ Advanced analytics
✅ Priority support
✅ Custom integrations
✅ SOC 2 compliance

This offer expires April 12th!

Click here to claim your discount: https://saasplatform.io/promo/50off

Happy building,
The SaaS Platform Team

You're receiving this because you signed up at saasplatform.io
Unsubscribe: https://saasplatform.io/unsubscribe
